rationale.R1.2: The text makes several inferential leaps (e.g., 'dominates the competition by a wide margin' from modest AUROC deltas; ablation on one benchmark generalizing to three); logical consistency between premises and conclusions is a natural target of any close read.
rationale.R1.3: Specific quantitative claims are central to the artifact (AUROC 0.912, Spearman ρ 0.68, balanced accuracy 0.83); verifying that stated numbers actually support the surrounding claim language is a plausible primary purpose of 'take a look.'
rationale.R1.6: Prose review — sentence-level clarity, rhetorical balance, hedging — is an equally plausible primary purpose of 'take a look at this paragraph,' making it co-equal with R1.3 and R1.2 in uncertainty.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty is asserted ('advances the state of the art,' MSA encoder 'absent from earlier scoring schemes') but adjudicating that delta against the prior-work landscape was not explicitly requested.
rationale.R1.7: Two references appear (Findlay et al.; Smith et al., 2021); citation accuracy is peripheral unless a scholarship audit was intended.
